mission: The new-age ad agency that is also the university of content creation. We serve everyone in the domain — from the purist photographer to the enterprise multimedia campaign. We create for businesses. We educate the industry. We build the tools that make both possible.

positioning.primary: Universal digital marketing agency powered by AI production capability
positioning.authority: The leading voice and source of truth in content creation
positioning.differentiator: We serve every user in the domain — purist to enterprise — with the right capability for their specific need

user_profiles.name: The Purist
user_profiles.description: Film photographer, analog artist, traditional craftsperson. The work is the art. Needs business infrastructure, not AI generation.

user_profiles.name: The Technical Creator
user_profiles.description: Videographer, colorist, audio engineer. Deep technical skill, drowning in execution time.

user_profiles.name: The Visual Artist
user_profiles.description: Photographer perfecting the image. Wants acceleration, not replacement of craft.

user_profiles.name: The Writer
user_profiles.description: Journalist, copywriter, brand strategist. Wants a thinking partner that sounds like them.

user_profiles.name: The Content Creator
user_profiles.description: YouTuber, podcaster, newsletter writer. One idea needs maximum distribution.

user_profiles.name: The Small Business Owner
user_profiles.description: Restaurant, retail, local service. Needs professional marketing without a team.

user_profiles.name: The Marketing Manager
user_profiles.description: Inside a mid-size company. Impossible deadlines, small team.

user_profiles.name: The Agency
user_profiles.description: Creative agency wanting to white-label production capability.

user_profiles.name: The Enterprise
user_profiles.description: Full multimedia campaign. Broadcast to social. Everything consistent, on-brand, on-time.

L1_intelligence.purpose: Build audience and authority. Convert to L2.

binding_pilot.purpose: Prove ERI algorithm accuracy and Content Lab production capability
binding_pilot.business_purpose: Becomes first public case study and sales asset

pgp_orlando.purpose: First client case study — local service business transformation
